en: Why don't I know you? I'm new. I just moved here from Africa.
ja: 新入りよ。アフリカから引っ越してきたの。
zhTW: 我是新來的。我剛從非洲搬來。
vi: Toi moi den. Toi vua chuyen den tu Chau Phi.

en: What? I used to be homeschooled. Wait, what?
ja: え？私はホームスクールだったの。
vi: Gi co? Toi truoc day hoc tai nha.

en: My mom taught me at home. No, no, I know what homeschool is. I'm not retarded.
ko: 아니, 아니, 홈스쿨이 뭔지 알아. 나 바보 아니야.
ja: いや、ホームスクールが何か知ってるよ。バカじゃないし。
zhTW: 不不，我知道什麼是自學。我又不笨。
vi: Khong, khong, toi biet hoc tai nha la gi. Toi khong ngu.

en: So you've actually never been to a real school before?
ko: 그럼 진짜 학교에 가본 적이 없는 거야?
ja: じゃあ本当に学校に行ったことないの？
zhTW: 所以你真的從來沒去過真正的學校？
vi: Vay ban chua bao gio den truong that su?

en: I didn't say anything. Homeschooled. That's really interesting.
ja: ホームスクール。面白いね。
vi: Hoc tai nha. That thu vi.

en: Thanks. You're, like, really pretty. Thank you.
ja: ありがとう。あなた本当にきれい。
vi: Cam on. Ban dep that do.

en: So you agree? What? You think you're really pretty.
ja: 自分が本当にきれいだと思ってるの。
zhTW: 你覺得自己真的很漂亮。
vi: Ban nghi minh dep that a?

en: Oh, I don't know. Oh my god, I love your bracelet. Where did you get it?
ja: ブレスレットかわいい！どこで買ったの？
zhTW: 天哪，我愛你的手環。在哪裡買的？
vi: Troi oi, toi thich chiec vong tay cua ban. Mua o dau vay?

en: Oh, my mom made it for me. It's adorable.
ja: ママが作ってくれたの。かわいい。
zhTW: 噢，我媽做給我的。好可愛。
vi: O, me toi lam cho toi. Dang yeu qua.

en: It's so fetch. What is fetch?
ja: すごくフェッチだね。フェッチって何？
vi: That la fetch. Fetch la gi?

en: Oh, it's like slang from England.
ko: 아, 그건 속어야. 영국에서 온 거야.
ja: スラングよ。イギリスから。
zhTW: 噢，那是俚語。從英國來的。
vi: O, do la tieng long. Tu Anh quoc.

en: So if you're from Africa, why are you white?
ja: アフリカ出身なのになぜ白人なの？
zhTW: 那如果你來自非洲，為什麼你是白人？
vi: Vay neu ban tu Chau Phi, sao ban lai la nguoi trang?

en: Oh my god, Karen, you can't just ask people why they're white.
ko: 오 마이 갓, 카렌, 사람들에게 왜 백인인지 물어보면 안 돼.
ja: カレン、人になぜ白人か聞いちゃダメでしょ。
zhTW: 天哪，乔倫，你不能直接問人為什麼是白人。
vi: Troi oi, Karen, ban khong the hoi nguoi ta sao ho la nguoi trang.

en: Could you give us some privacy for, like, one second? Yeah, sure.
ko: 우리에게 사생활을 좀 줄 수 있어? 한 순간만?
ja: ちょっとだけプライバシーくれる？
zhTW: 你可以給我們一點隱私嗎？就一下下？
vi: Ban co the cho chung toi chut rieng tu khong? Chi mot giay thoi?
